title: rubus × dejectus
intro: Rubus × dejectus is a hybrid species of raspberry, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus (the wild raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (the blackberry). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Rubus × dejectus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus × dejectus often involve drying the leaves and roots, which can then be infused in hot water or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
